笔记

Notes

引言：事物为何流行

Introduction: Why Things Catch On

六成已消失： www.econ.ucsb.edu/~tedb/Courses/Ec1F07/restaurantsfail.pdf。

Sixty percent are gone: www.econ.ucsb.edu/~tedb/Courses/Ec1F07/restaurantsfail.pdf.

“就像在吃黄金一样”：摘自 Barclay Prime 的 Yelp 页面， http://www.yelp.com/biz/barclay-prime-philadelphia。

“It was like eating gold”: Taken from Barclay Prime’s Yelp page, http://www.yelp.com/biz/barclay-prime-philadelphia.

大多数餐馆都会失败： Shane, Scott (2008)，“创业失败率——真实数据”，《小企业趋势》 ，4月28日， http://smallbiztrends.com/2008/04/startup-failure-rates.html。

Most restaurants bomb: Shane, Scott (2008), “Startup Failure Rates—The REAL numbers,” Small Business Trends, April 28, http://smallbiztrends.com/2008/04/startup-failure-rates.html.

人们分享超过 16,000 个单词：参见 Mehl, Matthais R.、Simine Vazire、Nairan Ramirez-Esparza、Richard B. Slatcher 和 James W. Pennebaker (2007)，“女性真的比男性更健谈吗？”《科学》 317，82。

People share more than 16,000 words: See Mehl, Matthais R., Simine Vazire, Nairan Ramirez-Esparza, Richard B. Slatcher, and James W. Pennebaker (2007), “Are Women Really More Talkative Than Men?” Science 317, 82.

1 亿次关于品牌的对话：参见 Keller、Ed 和 Barak Libai (2009)，“口碑衡量的整体方法”，在斯德哥尔摩 ESOMAR 全球媒体测量大会上的演讲（5 月 4 日至 6 日）。

100 million conversations about brands: see Keller, Ed, and Barak Libai (2009), “A Holistic Approach to the Measurement of WOM,” presentation at ESOMAR Worldwide Media Measurement Conference, Stockholm (May 4–6).

我们尝试邻居推荐的网站：参见 Trusov、Michael、Randolph E. Bucklin 和 Koen Pauwels (2009)，“口碑营销与传统营销的效果：来自互联网社交网站的发现”，《市场营销杂志》73（9 月），90-102。

We try websites our neighbors recommend: see Trusov, Michael, Randolph E. Bucklin, and Koen Pauwels (2009), “Effects of Word-of-Mouth Versus Traditional Marketing: Findings from an Internet Social Networking Site,” Journal of Marketing 73 (September), 90–102.

口碑是主要因素： Bughin、Jacques、Jonathan Doogan 和 Ole Jørgen Vetvik (2010)，“衡量口碑营销的新方法”，麦肯锡季刊（白皮书）。

Word of mouth is the primary factor: Bughin, Jacques, Jonathan Doogan, and Ole Jørgen Vetvik (2010), “A New Way to Measure Word-of-Mouth Marketing,” McKinsey Quarterly (white paper).

Goel、Watts 和 Goldstein 2012 年： “在线扩散的结构”网络”，第 13 届 ACM 电子商务会议(EC '12) 会议录。

Goel, Watts, and Goldstein 2012: “The Structure of Online Diffusion Networks,” Proceedings of the 13th ACM Conference on Electronic Commerce (EC ’12).

餐厅销售额增加 200 美元：参见 Godes、David 和 Dina Mayzlin (2009)，“公司创造的口碑传播：来自实地研究的证据”，《营销科学》 28，第 4 期，721-39 页。

$200 increase in restaurant sales: see Godes, David, and Dina Mayzlin (2009), “Firm-Created Word-of-Mouth Communication: Evidence from a Field Study,” Marketing Science 28, no. 4, 721–39.

又售出了二十本书： Chevalier, Judith 和 Dina Mayzlin (2006)，“口碑对销售的影响：在线书评”，《市场营销研究杂志》 43，第 3 期，345-54 页。

twenty more books sold: Chevalier, Judith, and Dina Mayzlin (2006), “The Effect of Word of Mouth on Sales: Online Book Reviews,” Journal of Marketing Research 43, no. 3, 345–54.

医生更有可能： Iyengar、Raghuram、Christophe Van den Bulte 和 Thomas W. Valente (2011)，“新产品扩散中的意见领袖和社会传染”，《营销科学》 30，第 2 期，195-212 页。

Doctors are more likely: Iyengar, Raghuram, Christophe Van den Bulte, and Thomas W. Valente (2011), “Opinion Leadership and Social Contagion in New Product Diffusion,” Marketing Science 30, no. 2, 195–212.

人们更有可能： Christakis, Nicholas A. 和 James Fowler (2009)，《互联：我们社交网络的惊人力量及其如何塑造我们的生活》（纽约：Little, Brown and Company）。

People are more likely: Christakis, Nicholas A., and James Fowler (2009), Connected: The Surprising Power of Our Social Networks and How They Shape Our Lives (New York: Little, Brown and Company).

尽管传统广告仍然有用： Stephen、Andrew 和 Jeff Galak (2012)，“传统媒体和社交媒体对销售的影响：一项关于小额贷款市场的研究”，《市场营销研究杂志》（即将出版）；Trusov、Bucklin 和 Pauwels，“口碑营销与传统营销的效果”。

while traditional advertising is still useful: Stephen, Andrew, and Jeff Galak (2012), “The Effects of Traditional and Social Earned Media on Sales: A Study of a Microlending Marketplace,” Journal of Marketing Research (forthcoming); Trusov, Bucklin, and Pauwels, “Effects of Word-of-Mouth Versus Traditional Marketing.”

朋友推荐的客户： Schmitt、Philipp、Bernd Skiera 和 Christophe Van den Bulte (2011)，“推荐计划和客户价值”，《市场营销杂志》 75（1 月），46-59。另见http://techcrunch.com/2011/11/27/social-proof-why-people-like-to-follow-the-crowd。

customers referred by their friends: Schmitt, Philipp, Bernd Skiera, and Christophe Van den Bulte (2011), “Referral Programs and Customer Value,” Journal of Marketing 75 (January), 46–59. See also http://techcrunch.com/2011/11/27/social-proof-why-people-like-to-follow-the-crowd.

数百万用户使用这些网站： Eridon, Corey (2011)，“每月在 Facebook 上分享 250 亿条内容”， HubSpot 博客，12 月 2 日， http://blog.hubspot.com/blog/tabid/6307/bid/29407/25-Billion-Pieces-of-Content-Get-Shared-on-Facebook-Monthly-INFOGRAPHIC.aspx。

Millions of people use these sites: Eridon, Corey (2011), “25 Billion Pieces of Content Get Shared on Facebook Monthly,” Hubspot Blog, December 2, http://blog.hubspot.com/blog/tabid/6307/bid/29407/25-Billion-Pieces-of-Content-Get-Shared-on-Facebook-Monthly-INFOGRAPHIC.aspx.

实际数字是 7%：这本书对面对面口碑的重要性提供了非常好的见解：Keller, Ed 和 Brad Fay (2012)，《面对面之书：为什么真实的人际关系在数字市场中占据主导地位》（纽约：自由出版社）。

The actual number is 7 percent: This book provides a really nice perspective on the importance of face-to-face word of mouth: Keller, Ed, and Brad Fay (2012), The Face-to-Face Book: Why Real Relationships Rule in a Digital Marketplace (New York: Free Press).

每天接近两个小时：参见http://news.cnet.com/8301-1023_3-10421016-93.html。

Close to two hours a day: See http://news.cnet.com/8301-1023_3-10421016-93.html.

平均推文： Arthur, Charles (2009)，“平均 Twitter 用户有 126 位关注者，只有 20% 的用户通过网站访问”，《卫报》，3 月 29 日， http://www.guardian.co.uk/technology/blog/2009/jun/29/twitter-users-average-api-traffic。

the average tweet: Arthur, Charles (2009), “Average Twitter User has 126 Followers, and Only 20% of Users Go via Website,” The Guardian, March 29, http://www.guardian.co.uk/technology/blog/2009/jun/29/twitter-users-average-api-traffic.

线下讨论更为普遍：当思考是否口碑传播的效果取决于线上或线下渠道，同时也要考虑目标行为发生的地点。如果你想让人们访问某个网站，那么线上口碑传播效果显著，因为只需点击一下鼠标即可完成目标行为。线下产品或行为也是如此。例如，关于意面酱的线上口碑传播固然不错，但人们最终还是需要在实体店购买，所以线下口碑传播的效果可能更好。此外，还要考虑人们在购买前是否会进行研究，以及研究渠道。虽然大多数人在线下购买汽车，但他们通常会在网上进行大量研究，甚至可能在踏入经销商展厅之前就已经做出决定。在这种情况下，线上口碑传播可能会影响他们的最终决定。

offline discussions are more prevalent: When thinking about whether online or offline word of mouth will be more effective, also think about where the desired action is taking place. If you’re trying to get people to check out a website, then online word of mouth is great because the desired action is only a click away. The same thing is true with offline products or behaviors. Online word of mouth about pasta sauce is great, but people need to remember to buy it when they’re actually in the store, so offline word of mouth may be even better. Also think about whether and where people do research before they buy. While most people buy a car offline, they do a lot of research online and may make their decision before they ever step into the dealership. In those instances, online word of mouth may sway their decision.

仅占 0.33%：参见http://articles.businessinsider.com/2009-05-20/tech/30027787_1_tubemogul-videos-viral-hits。

Only one-third of 1 percent: See http://articles.businessinsider.com/2009-05-20/tech/30027787_1_tubemogul-videos-viral-hits.

“通过努力”：格拉德威尔，马尔科姆（2000），《引爆点：小事如何产生大影响》（纽约：利特尔，布朗）。

“by the efforts”: Gladwell, Malcolm (2000), The Tipping Point: How Little Things Can Make a Big Difference (New York: Little, Brown).

“十分之一的美国人”：凯勒、埃德和乔恩·贝瑞（2003 年），《有影响力的人：十分之一的美国人告诉其他九分之一的人如何投票、在哪里吃饭和买什么》（纽约：自由出版社）。

“one in 10 Americans”: Keller, Ed, and Jon Berry (2003), The Influentials: One American in Ten Tells the Other Nine How to Vote, Where to Eat, and What to Buy (New York: Free Press).

让内容病毒式传播：目前几乎没有可靠的实证证据表明，拥有更多社交关系或更具说服力的人对内容的流行度有更大的影响。参见 Bakshy, Eytan, Jake Hofman, Winter A. Mason 和 Duncan J. Watts (2011)，“人人都是影响者：量化 Twitter 上的影响力”，第四届国际网络搜索与数据挖掘会议论文集，香港；另见 Watts, Duncan J. 和 Peter S. Dodds (2007)，“网络、影响与公众舆论形成”，《消费者研究杂志》 34，第 4 期，441–58 页。想想你最近一次转发别人讲的故事。你转发是因为讲故事的人很受欢迎吗？还是因为故事本身很有趣或很令人惊讶？想想你最近一次转发别人发给你的新闻文章。你转发是因为发文章的人特别有说服力吗？或者是因为你知道其他人会对故事中包含的信息感兴趣？在这些以及大多数其他情况下，口碑传播的驱动力是信息本身，而不是信息的传递者。

making things go viral: Right now there is little good empirical evidence that people who have more social ties or who are more persuasive have a bigger impact on what catches on. See Bakshy, Eytan, Jake Hofman, Winter A. Mason, and Duncan J. Watts (2011), “Everyone’s an Influencer: Quantifying Influence on Twitter,” Proceedings of the Fourth International Conference on Web Search and Data Mining, Hong Kong; see also Watts, Duncan J., and Peter S. Dodds (2007), “Networks, Influence, and Public Opinion Formation,” Journal of Consumer Research 34, no. 4, 441–58. Think about the last story someone told you that you passed on. Did you share it because the person who told you was really popular? Or because the story itself was so funny or surprising? Think about the last news article someone sent you that you forwarded on to someone else. Did you pass it along because the person who sent it was particularly persuasive? Or because you knew someone else would be interested in the information the story contained? In these and most other cases, the driving force behind word of mouth is the message, not the messenger.

汤姆·迪克森正在寻找一份新工作： Sauer, Patrick J. (2008)，“一位病毒视频超级明星的自白”，《Inc.》杂志，6月19日。访问http://jonahberger.com观看汤姆使用 iPhone 进行混音。

Tom Dickson was looking for a new job: Sauer, Patrick J. (2008), “Confessions of a Viral Video Superstar,” Inc. magazine, June 19. Go to http://jonahberger.com to see Tom blending an iPhone.

Blendtec成立于1999年：参见http://donteattheshrimp.com/2007/07/03/will-it-blend-gets-blendtec-in-the-wsj/ 以及http://magazine.byu.edu/?act=view&a=2391，其中包含一些关于 Blendtec 早期岁月的精彩讨论。

in 1999 Blendtec was founded: See http://donteattheshrimp.com/2007/07/03/will-it-blend-gets-blendtec-in-the-wsj/ and http://magazine.byu.edu/?act=view&a=2391 for some good discussions of the early years at Blendtec.

1.社交货币

1. Social Currency

Brian 决定：于 2012 年 5 月 16 日采访 Brian Shebairo，于 2012 年 5 月 13 日采访 Jim Meehan。

Brian decided: Interviews with Brian Shebairo on May 16, 2012, and Jim Meehan on May 13, 2012.

人们谈论的 40% 的内容：邓巴、罗伯特·IM、安娜·马里奥特和 NDC 邓肯 (1997)，“人类会话行为”，《人类本性》 8，第 3 期，231-44 页。

40 percent of what people talk about: Dunbar, Robert I. M., Anna Marriott, and N. D. C. Duncan (1997), “Human Conversational Behavior,” Human Nature 8, no. 3, 231–44.

一半的推文都以“我”为中心： Naaman、Mor、Jeffrey Boase 和 Chih-Hui Lai (2010)，“这真的与我有关吗？社交意识流中的信息内容”， ACM 会议论文集，189-92。

half of tweets are “me” focused: Naaman, Mor, Jeffrey Boase, and Chih-Hui Lai (2010), “Is It Really About Me? Message Content in Social Awareness Streams,” Proceedings of the ACM Conference, 189–92.

Jason Mitchell 和 Diana Tamir： Tamir, Diana I. 和 Jason P. Mitchell (2012)，“披露有关自身的信息本身就是一种奖励”，美国国家科学院院刊109，第 21 期，8038–43。

Jason Mitchell and Diana Tamir: Tamir, Diana I., and Jason P. Mitchell (2012), “Disclosing Information About the Self Is Intrinsically Rewarding,” Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences 109, no. 21, 8038–43.

我们做出有根据的推测：参见 Berger、Jonah 和 Chip Heath (2008)，“谁驱动分歧？身份信号、外群体差异和文化品味的放弃”，《人格与社会心理学杂志》 95，第 3 期，593–605 页。另见 Berger、Jonah 和 Chip Heath (2007)，“消费者与他人分歧之处：身份信号和产品领域”，《消费者研究杂志》 34，第 2 期，121–34 页，其中讨论了该领域的研究。

We make educated guesses: See Berger, Jonah, and Chip Heath (2008), “Who Drives Divergence? Identity Signaling, Outgroup Dissimilarity, and the Abandonment of Cultural Tastes,” Journal of Personality and Social Psychology 95, no. 3, 593–605. See also Berger, Jonah, and Chip Heath (2007), “Where Consumers Diverge from Others: Identity Signaling and Product Domains,” Journal of Consumer Research 34, no. 2, 121–34, for discussions of research in this area.

Prada 手提包： Wojnicki, Andrea C. 和 Dave Godes (2010)，“口碑作为自我提升”，多伦多大学工作论文。另见 De Angelis, Matteo、Andrea Bonezzi、Alessandro Peluso、Derek Rucker 和 Michele Costabile (2012)，“论吹牛者和八卦者：口碑产生和传播的自我提升理论”，《市场营销研究杂志》，即将发表。

Prada handbag: Wojnicki, Andrea C., and Dave Godes (2010), “Word-of-Mouth as Self-Enhancement,” University of Toronto working paper. See also De Angelis, Matteo, Andrea Bonezzi, Alessandro Peluso, Derek Rucker, and Michele Costabile (2012), “On Braggarts and Gossips: A Self-Enhancement Account of Word-of-Mouth Generation and Transmission,” Journal of Marketing Research, forthcoming.

一些“非同寻常”的事情：有关 Snapple 事实背后的故事的讨论，请参阅http://mittelmitte.blogspot.com/2006/09/snapple-real-facts-are-100-true.html和http://mysnapplerealfacts.blogspot.com/。

Something “out of the ordinary”: For a discussion of the story behind Snapple facts, see http://mittelmitte.blogspot.com/2006/09/snapple-real-facts-are-100-true.html and http://mysnapplerealfacts.blogspot.com/.

沃顿商学院教授 Raghu Iyengar： Berger、Jonah 和 Raghuram Iyengar (2013)，“兴趣如何塑造不同渠道的口碑传播”，沃顿商学院工作论文。

Wharton professor Raghu Iyengar: Berger, Jonah, and Raghuram Iyengar (2013), “How Interest Shapes Word-of-Mouth over Different Channels,” Wharton working paper.

更多有趣的推文： Bakshy、Eytan、Jake M. Hofman、Winter A. Mason 和 Duncan J. Watts (2011)，“人人都是影响者：量化 Twitter 上的影响力”，WSDM，65-74。另见 Berger, Jonah 和 Katherine Milkman (2012)，“是什么让在线内容病毒式传播”，《市场营销研究杂志》 49，第 2 期，192-205。

More interesting tweets: Bakshy, Eytan, Jake M. Hofman, Winter A. Mason, and Duncan J. Watts (2011), “Everyone’s an Influencer: Quantifying Influence on Twitter,” WSDM, 65–74. See also Berger, Jonah, and Katherine Milkman (2012), “What Makes Online Content Viral,” Journal of Marketing Research 49, no. 2, 192–205.

伊利诺伊大学的心理学家： Burrus、Jeremy、Justin Kruger 和 Amber Jurgens (2006)，“真相永远不会妨碍一个好故事：为了娱乐而扭曲故事”，伊利诺伊大学工作论文。

psychologists from the University of Illinois: Burrus, Jeremy, Justin Kruger, and Amber Jurgens (2006), “The Truth Never Stands in the Way of a Good Story: The Distortion of Stories in the Service of Entertainment,” University of Illinois working paper.

制造惊喜的一种方法：希思、奇普和丹·希思（2011 年），《让创意粘住：为什么有些想法能流传下来，而有些想法会消亡》（纽约：兰登书屋）。

One way to generate surprise: Heath, Chip, and Dan Heath (2011), Made to Stick: Why Some Ideas Survive and Others Die (New York: Random House).

谜团与争议：同上。另见 Chen, Zoey 和 Jonah Berger (2012)，“争议何时、为何以及如何引发对话”，沃顿工作论文。

Mysteries and controversy: Ibid. See also Chen, Zoey, and Jonah Berger (2012), “When, Why, and How Controversy Causes Conversation,” Wharton working paper.

采用手持摄像机拍摄：有关《女巫布莱尔》的详细信息，请访问http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Blair_Witch_Project。

Shot on a handheld camera: Details about The Blair Witch Project can be found at http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Blair_Witch_Project.

黑色卫生纸：有关生产彩色卫生纸的葡萄牙公司 Renova 的信息，请访问http://www.renovaonline.net/_global/。

black toilet paper: Information about Renova, the Portuguese company that makes colored toilet paper, can be found at http://www.renovaonline.net/_global/.

1.8 亿人：有关常旅客计划的事实来自http://www.frequentflyerservices.com/press_room/facts_and_stats/frequent_flyer_facts.php和http://www.prweb.com/releases/2011/11/prweb8925371.htm。

180 million people: The facts about frequent flier programs came from http://www.frequentflyerservices.com/press_room/facts_and_stats/frequent_flyer_facts.php and http://www.prweb.com/releases/2011/11/prweb8925371.htm.

离散的标记激励我们：有关目标如何作为参考点以及离散的进度标记如何影响动机的信息，可以在以下文献中找到：Heath, Chip, Richard P. Larrick 和 George Wu (1999)，“目标作为参考点”，《认知心理学》 38，79-109；Amir, On 和 Dan Ariely (2008)，“安于现状：离散的进度标记作为子目标对任务表现和偏好的影响”，《实验心理学杂志：学习、记忆和认知》34，第 5 期，1158-71；以及 Kivetz, Ran, Oleg Urminsky 和 ​​Yuhuang Zheng (2006)，“目标梯度假设的复兴：购买加速、虚幻的目标进展和客户保留”，《市场营销研究杂志》 43，第 1 期，39-56。

discrete markers motivate us: Information about how goals can act as reference points and how discrete progress markers can affect motivation can be found in: Heath, Chip, Richard P. Larrick, and George Wu (1999), “Goals as Reference Points,” Cognitive Psychology 38, 79–109; Amir, On, and Dan Ariely (2008), “Resting on Laurels: The Effects of Discrete Progress Markers as Sub-goals on Task Performance and Preferences,” Journal of Experimental Psychology: Learning, Memory, and Cognition 34, no. 5, 1158–71; and Kivetz, Ran, Oleg Urminsky, and Yuhuang Zheng (2006), “The Goal-Gradient Hypothesis Resurrected: Purchase Acceleration, Illusionary Goal Progress, and Customer Retention,” Journal of Marketing Research 43, no. 1, 39–56.

通过提高动机，卡片： Kivetz、Ran、Oleg Urminsky 和 ​​Yuhuang Zheng (2006)，“目标梯度假设的复兴：购买加速、虚幻的目标进展和客户保留”，《市场营销研究杂志》，43（2 月），39-58。

By increasing motivation, the cards: Kivetz, Ran, Oleg Urminsky, and Yuhuang Zheng (2006), “The Goal-Gradient Hypothesis Resurrected: Purchase Acceleration, Illusionary Goal Progress, and Customer Retention,” Journal of Marketing Research, 43 (February), 39–58.

他们更倾向于做得更好： Solnick, SJ 和 D. Hemenway (1998)，“越多越好吗？关于地位关注的调查。”《经济行为与组织杂志》 37，373–83。

They preferred to do better: Solnick, S. J., and D. Hemenway (1998), “Is More Always Better? A Survey on Positional Concerns.” Journal of Economic Behavior and Organization 37, 373–83.

此次竞赛有助于促进销售：有关 Burberry 的“风衣的艺术”活动的信息可在以下网址找到： http://blogs.wsj.com/source/2010/01/19/burberry%E2%80%99s-trench-website-too-good-to-be-true/和http://www.1to1media.com/weblog/2010/01/internet_marketing_from_the_tr.html。

the contest helped drive sales: Information about Burberry’s “Art of the Trench” campaign can be found at http://blogs.wsj.com/source/2010/01/19/burberry%E2%80%99s-trench-website-too-good-to-be-true/ and http://www.1to1media.com/weblog/2010/01/internet_marketing_from_the_tr.html.

“就像礼宾服务一样”： 2012年6月12日对本·费什曼的采访。感谢戴夫·巴尔特向我介绍了这个精彩的故事。

“It’s like the concierge”: Interview with Ben Fischman on June 12, 2012. Thanks to Dave Balter for introducing me to this great story.

如果某物难以获得：关于努力如何影响价值推断的讨论，请参见 Aronson, Elliot (1997)，“认知失调理论：一个观念的演变与变迁”，载于Craig McGarty 和 S. Alexander Haslam 编辑的《社会心理学的启示：社会中的心智视角》（马尔登，马萨诸塞州：布莱克威尔出版社），第 20-35 页；以及 Aronson, Elliot 和 Judson Mills (1959)，“入会仪式的严苛程度对群体喜好的影响”，《异常与社会心理学杂志》 66，第 6 期，第 584-588 页。另请参见 Sela, Aner 和 Jonah Berger (2011)，“决策流沙：琐碎的选择如何让我们深陷其中”，《消费者研究杂志》，第 39 页。

If something is difficult to obtain: For a discussion of how effort influences inferences of value, see Aronson, Elliot (1997), “The Theory of Cognitive Dissonance: The Evolution and Vicissitudes of an Idea,” in The Message of Social Psychology: Perspectives on Mind in Society, ed. Craig McGarty and S. Alexander Haslam (Malden, Mass.: Blackwell Publishing), 20–35; and Aronson, Elliot, and Judson Mills (1959), “The Effect of Severity of Initiation on Liking for a Group,” Journal of Abnormal and Social Psychology 66, no. 6, 584–88. See also Sela, Aner, and Jonah Berger (2011), “Decision Quicksand: How Trivial Choices Suck Us In,” Journal of Consumer Research, 39.

人们评价烹饪书：关于稀缺性如何影响价值，已有许多有价值的论文。参见 Verhallen, Theo (1982)，“稀缺性与消费者选择行为”，《经济心理学杂志》 2，299–322；Worchel, S.、J. Lee 和 A. Adewole (1975)，“供求关系对物品价值评价的影响”，《人格与社会心理学杂志》32，906–14；Fromkin, HL、JC Olson、RL Dipboye 和 D. Barnaby (1971)，“消费者对稀缺产品的偏好的商品理论分析”，《美国心理学会第79届年会论文集》，1971年，第653–54页。

People evaluate cookbooks: There are a number of valuable papers on how scarcity affects value. See Verhallen, Theo (1982), “Scarcity and Consumer Choice Behavior,” Journal of Economic Psychology 2, 299–322; Worchel, S., J. Lee, and A. Adewole (1975), “Effects of Supply and Demand on Ratings of Object Value,” Journal of Personality and Social Psychology 32, 906–14; Fromkin, H. L., J. C. Olson, R. L. Dipboye, and D. Barnaby (1971), “A Commodity Theory Analysis of Consumer Preferences for Scarce Products,” Proceedings 79th Annual Convention of the American Psychological Association, 1971, pp. 653–54.

麦乐鸡：感谢 Dave Balter 告诉我麦乐鸡定位器。有关这个故事的背景详情，请参见http://www.maxim.com/funny/the-cult-of-the-mcrib-0和http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/McRib。

Chicken McNuggets: Thanks to Dave Balter for telling me about the McRib locator. For background details on the story, see http://www.maxim.com/funny/the-cult-of-the-mcrib-0 and http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/McRib.

一旦你付钱给别人：关于内在动机和外在动机的早期（且非常巧妙的）研究，请参见 Lepper, Mark R.、David Greene 和 Richard E. Nisbett (1973)，“用外在奖励削弱儿童的内在兴趣：对‘过度合理化’假设的检验”，《社会与人格心理学杂志》 28，第 1 期，129–37 页。关于更新的论述，请参见 Heyman, James 和 Dan Ariely (2004)，“付出与回报：两个市场的故事”，《心理科学》 15，第 11 期，787–93 页。

as soon as you pay people: For early (and extremely clever) research on intrinsic and extrinsic motivation, see Lepper, Mark R., David Greene, and Richard E. Nisbett (1973), “Undermining Children’s Intrinsic Interest with Extrinsic Reward: A Test of the ‘Overjustification’ Hypothesis,” Journal of Social and Personality Psychology 28, no. 1, 129–37. For a more recent treatment, see Heyman, James, and Dan Ariely (2004), “Effort for Payment: A Tale of Two Markets,” Psychological Science 15, no. 11, 787–93.

2.触发器

2. Triggers

“没有人谈论无聊的公司”： Sernovitz, Andy (2006)，《口碑营销：聪明的公司如何让人们谈论》（芝加哥：Kaplan Publishing）。

“Nobody talks about boring companies”: Sernovitz, Andy (2006), Word of Mouth Marketing: How Smart Companies Get People Talking (Chicago: Kaplan Publishing).

人们都在谈论 Cheerios：蜂蜜坚果 Cheerios 的口碑传播比迪士尼乐园更广，这一发现来自我们本章讨论的 BzzAgent 分析：Berger, Jonah 和 Eric Sc​​hwartz (2011)，“是什么驱动了即时和持续的口碑传播？”《市场营销杂志》，10 月，869-80 页。这一发现也来自 Twitter 上关于这两个品牌讨论频率的数据。

People talk about Cheerios: The finding that Honey Nut Cheerios get more word of mouth than Walt Disney World comes from the BzzAgent analysis we discuss in this chapter: Berger, Jonah, and Eric Schwartz (2011), “What Drives Immediate and Ongoing Word-of-Mouth?” Journal of Marketing, October, 869–80. The finding also comes from Twitter data on the frequency with which these two brands are discussed.

十六个口碑传播案例： Carl, Walter (2006)，“大家都在热议什么？日常沟通以及口碑和口碑营销实践的关系基础”，《管理沟通季刊》 19，601-34。

sixteen word-of-mouth episodes: Carl, Walter (2006), “What’s All the Buzz About? Everyday Communication and the Relational Basis of Word-of-Mouth and Buzz Marketing Practices,” Management Communication Quarterly 19, 601–34.

美国消费者提及特定品牌： Keller、Ed 和 Barak Libai (2009)，“口碑衡量的整体方法”，在斯德哥尔摩 ESOMAR 全球媒体测量大会上的演讲（5 月 4 日至 6 日）。

American consumers mention specific brands: Keller, Ed, and Barak Libai (2009), “A Holistic Approach to the Measurement of WOM,” presentation at ESOMAR Worldwide Media Measurement Conference, Stockholm (May 4–6).

戴夫给了我的同事埃里克·施瓦茨一份资料：其中包括每次推广活动中的产品信息，以及每位BzzAgent提交的BzzReports数量。我们尤其感兴趣的是，我们可以分析每位经纪人对每款产品产生的口碑传播情况。毕竟，有些人可能比其他人更善于口口相传：健谈的凯西比安静的昆汀更爱说话。但通过观察每位经纪人在不同推广活动中的发言量，我们可以发现一些规律。我们可以看到，一位经纪人是否更热衷于谈论某个咖啡品牌，而不是某种新型数码相机。我们还可以开始了解为什么某些产品比其他产品更容易获得口碑传播。这不仅仅是人们是否更热衷于谈论某些产品类别（例如食品）而不是其他产品类别（例如电影），而是真正驱动讨论的根本原因——谈话的心理学。

Dave gave my colleague Eric Schwartz: This included information about the product in each campaign and the number of BzzReports each BzzAgent submitted. We were especially interested in the fact that we could analyze the buzz generated by each product by agent. After all, certain people might share more word of mouth than others: Chatty Cathys talk more than Quiet Quentins. But by looking at how much individual agents talked across different campaigns, we could identify patterns. We could see whether an agent talked more about a coffee brand than a new type of digital camera. And we could start to understand why certain products got more word of mouth than others. Not just whether people talked about certain product categories (such as food) more than others (such as movies), but what really drives discussion in the first place—the psychology of talk.

有些想法更让我印象深刻：可及性是心理学中的一个重要话题；关于该主题的一些经典研究，请参阅 Higgins、E. Tory 和 G. King (1981)，“社会建构的可及性：个体和情境变异的信息处理后果”，载于N. Cantor 和 JF Kihlstrom 编辑的《人格、认知和社会互动》（新泽西州希尔斯代尔：劳伦斯·厄尔鲍姆出版社）。60–81；以及 Wyer, Robert S. 和 TK Srull (1981)，“类别可及性：关于社会刺激信息处理的一些理论和经验问题”，载于《社会认知：安大略研讨会》，第 1 卷，ET Higgins、CP Herman 和 MP Zanna 编辑（新泽西州希尔斯代尔：劳伦斯·埃尔鲍姆出版社），161–97。

some thoughts are more top of mind: Accessibility is a huge topic in psychology; for some classic research on the topic, see Higgins, E. Tory, and G. King (1981), “Accessibility of Social Constructs: Information-processing Consequences of Individual and Contextual Variability,” in Personality, Cognition, and Social Interaction, ed. N. Cantor and J. F. Kihlstrom (Hillsdale, N.J.: Lawrence Erlbaum), 60–81; and Wyer, Robert S., and T. K. Srull (1981), “Category Accessibility: Some Theoretical and Empirical Issues Concerning the Processing of Social Stimulus Information,” in Social Cognition: The Ontario Symposium, vol. 1, ed. E. T. Higgins, C. P. Herman, and M. P. Zanna (Hillsdale, N. J.: Lawrence Erlbaum), 161–97.

有些事物是长期可及的：有关长期可及性的早期论文，请参阅 Bargh, John A.、WJ Lombardi 和 E. Tory Higgins (1988)，“人情境对人知觉的影响中长期可及结构的自动化：这只是时间问题”，《人格与社会心理学杂志》 55，第 4 期，599-605 页。

Some things are chronically accessible: For an early paper on chronic accessibility, see Bargh, John A., W. J. Lombardi, and E. Tory Higgins (1988), “Automaticity of Chronically Accessible Constructs in Person X Situation Effects on Person Perception: It’s Just a Matter of Time,” Journal of Personality and Social Psychology 55, no. 4, 599–605.

周围环境中的刺激：关于环境刺激和扩散激活的研究文献浩如烟海，其中一些经典著作包括：Anderson, John R. (1983), The Architecture of Cognition (Cambridge, Mass.: Harvard University Press); Collins, Allan M., and Elizabeth F. Loftus (1975), “A Spreading-Activation Theory of Semantic Processing,” Psychological Review 82, no. 6, 407–28; 以及 Higgins, Tory E., William S. Rholes, and Carl R. Jones (1977), “Category Accessibility and Impression Formation,” Journal of Social Psychology 13 (March), 141–54。关于消费情境下的例子，参见 Nedungadi, P. (1990), “Recall and Consumer Consideration Sets: Influencing Choice Without Altering Brand Evaluations,” Journal of Consumer Research 17, no. 3, 263–76；以及 Berger、Jonah 和 Gráinne M. Fitzsimons (2008)，“街上的狗，脚上的彪马：环境中的线索如何影响产品评价和选择”，《市场营销研究杂志》 45，第 1 期，1–14 页。

stimuli in the surrounding environment: There is a huge literature on stimuli in the environment and spreading activation, but for some classics, see Anderson, John R. (1983), The Architecture of Cognition (Cambridge, Mass.: Harvard University Press); Collins, Allan M., and Elizabeth F. Loftus (1975), “A Spreading-Activation Theory of Semantic Processing,” Psychological Review 82, no. 6, 407–28; and Higgins, Tory E., William S. Rholes, and Carl R. Jones (1977), “Category Accessibility and Impression Formation,” Journal of Social Psychology 13 (March), 141–54. For examples in a consumption context, see Nedungadi, P. (1990), “Recall and Consumer Consideration Sets: Influencing Choice Without Altering Brand Evaluations,” Journal of Consumer Research 17, no. 3, 263–76; and Berger, Jonah, and Gráinne M. Fitzsimons (2008), “Dogs on the Street, Pumas on Your Feet: How Cues in the Environment Influence Product Evaluation and Choice,” Journal of Marketing Research 45, no. 1, 1–14.

糖果公司 Mars：怀特，迈克尔（1997 年），“玩具漫游车销量飙升：火星着陆让太空物品重焕光彩”，《亚利桑那共和报》，7 月 12A，E1。

the candy company Mars: White, Michael (1997), “Toy Rover Sales Soar into Orbit: Mars Landing Puts Gold Shine Back into Space Items,” Arizona Republic, July 12A, E1.

音乐研究者 Adrian North： North, Adrian C.、David J. Hargreaves 和 Jennifer McKendrick (1997)，“店内音乐影响产品选择”，《自然》 390（11 月），132。

Music researchers Adrian North: North, Adrian C., David J. Hargreaves, and Jennifer McKendrick (1997), “In-Store Music Affects Product Choice,” Nature 390 (November), 132.

心理学家格雷恩·菲茨西蒙斯：伯杰和菲茨西蒙斯，《街头的狗》，1-14。

Psychologist Gráinne Fitzsimons: Berger and Fitzsimons, “Dogs on the Street,” 1–14.

人们拥有核心信念： Riker, William 和 Peter Ordeshook (1968)，“投票计算理论”，《美国政治科学评论》 62，第 1 期，25-42 页。

people possess core beliefs: Riker, William, and Peter Ordeshook (1968), “A Theory of the Calculus of Voting,” American Political Science Review 62, no. 1, 25–42.

亚利桑那州 2000 年大选： Berger, Jonah, Marc Meredith 和 S. Christian Wheeler (2008)，“情境启动：人们投票地点影响他们的投票方式”，《美国国家科学院院刊》 105，第 26 期，8846–49。

Arizona’s 2000 general election: Berger, Jonah, Marc Meredith, and S. Christian Wheeler (2008), “Contextual Priming: Where People Vote Affects How They Vote,” Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences 105, no. 26, 8846–49.

丽贝卡的父母支付了四千美元：有关丽贝卡·布莱克的详细信息来自http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rebecca_Black。

Rebecca’s parents paid four thousand dollars: Details about Rebecca Black came from http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rebecca_Black.

触发因素促进口碑传播：另请参阅 Rosen, Emanuel (2003)，《口碑剖析》（伦敦：Profile Books），其中对触发因素进行了很好的相关讨论。

Triggers boost word of mouth: Also see Rosen, Emanuel (2003), Anatomy of Buzz (London: Profile Books), for a nice related discussion of triggers.

更常触发的产品： Berger、Jonah 和 Eric Sc​​hwartz (2011)，“是什么驱动了即时和持续的口碑？”《市场营销杂志》，10 月，869-80。

More frequently triggered products: Berger, Jonah, and Eric Schwartz (2011), “What Drives Immediate and Ongoing Word-of-Mouth?” Journal of Marketing, October, 869–80.

分析了数百篇《纽约时报》书评： Berger, Jonah, Alan T. Sorensen 和 Scott J. Rasmussen (2010)，“负面宣传的积极影响：负面评论如何增加销量”，《营销科学》 29，第 5 期，815-27 页。

analyzed hundreds of New York Times book reviews: Berger, Jonah, Alan T. Sorensen, and Scott J. Rasmussen (2010), “Positive Effects of Negative Publicity: When Negative Reviews Increase Sales,” Marketing Science 29, no. 5, 815–27.

Kit Kat 的主题曲：关于 Kit Kat 的历史详情来自http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kit_Kat。关于咖啡推广活动的详情来自 2012 年 2 月 9 日对 Colleen Chorak 的采访。

the Kit Kat tune: Details about Kit Kat’s history came from http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kit_Kat. Details about the coffee campaign came from an interview with Colleen Chorak on February 9, 2012.

十大“洗脑神曲”之一：关于《Give me a Break》这首歌是洗脑神曲的详情来自詹姆斯·凯拉里斯 (James Kellaris) 于 2003 年在消费者心理学会发表的题为“剖析洗脑神曲：关于‘洗脑神曲’现象的进一步证据”的演讲。另见http://www.webmd.com/mental-health/news/20030227/songs-stick-in-everyones-head。

one of the top ten “earworms”: Details about the “Give me a Break” song being an earworm came from Kellaris, James (2003), “Dissecting Earworms: Further Evidence on the ‘Song-Stuck-in-Your Head’ Phenomenon,” presentation to the Society for Consumer Psychology. See also http://www.webmd.com/mental-health/news/20030227/songs-stick-in-everyones-head.

思想也有其栖息地： Berger、Jonah 和 Chip Heath (2005)，“思想栖息地：环境线索的普遍性如何影响思想的成功”，认知科学29，第 2 期，195-221 页。

ideas also have habitats: Berger, Jonah, and Chip Heath (2005), “Idea Habitats: How the Prevalence of Environmental Cues Influences the Success of Ideas,” Cognitive Science 29, no. 2, 195–221.

我们与 BzzAgent 和 Boston Market 进行了一项实验： Berger 和 Schwartz，“是什么驱动了即时和持续的口碑传播？” 869–80。

an experiment we conducted with BzzAgent and Boston Market: Berger and Schwartz, “What Drives Immediate and Ongoing Word-of-Mouth?” 869–80.

“鲍勃，我得了肺气肿”：参见http://no-smoke.org/images/02_Bob_14x48.jpg。

“Bob, I’ve got emphysema”: See http://no-smoke.org/images/02_Bob_14x48.jpg.

毒寄生虫： Cialdini, Robert B.、Petia Petrova、Linda Demaine、Daniel Barrett、Brad Sagarin、Jon Manner 和 Kelton Rhoads (2005)，“毒寄生虫防御：削弱更强大对手说服力的策略”，亚利桑那大学工作论文。

the poison parasite: Cialdini, Robert B., Petia Petrova, Linda Demaine, Daniel Barrett, Brad Sagarin, Jon Manner, and Kelton Rhoads (2005), “The Poison Parasite Defense: A Strategy for Sapping a Stronger Opponent’s Persuasive Strength,” University of Arizona working paper.

安海斯-布希修改了广告语：西奥迪尼，罗伯特·B.（2001），《影响力：科学与实践》（马萨诸塞州尼德姆高地：Allyn & Bacon）。

Anheuser-Busch revised the slogan: Cialdini, Robert B. (2001), Influence: Science and Practice (Needham Heights, Mass.: Allyn & Bacon).

戳太多孔：有关扇形效应的信息可以在以下文献中找到：Anderson, John R. (1974)，“从长期记忆中检索命题信息”，认知心理学6，451–74；以及 Anderson, John R. (1983)，认知架构（马萨诸塞州剑桥：哈佛大学出版社）。

Poke too many holes: Information about the fan effect can be found in Anderson, John R. (1974), “Retrieval of Propositional Information from Long-term Memory,” Cognitive Psychology 6, 451–74; and Anderson, John R. (1983), The Architecture of Cognition (Cambridge, Mass.: Harvard University Press).

溢出的脂肪：要了解卫生部的活动，请访问http://jonahberger.com。

out spills fat: To see the Department of Health’s campaign in action, visit http://jonahberger.com.

与橙色相关的产品： Berger 和 Fitzsimons，“街头的狗”，1-14。

products associated with the color orange: Berger and Fitzsimons, “Dogs on the Street,” 1–14.

你会注意到一个清晰的规律：感谢 Scott A. Golder 提供这些数据。

you’ll notice a neat pattern: Thanks to Scott A. Golder for providing these data.

3.情绪

3. Emotion

纹影摄影：格雷迪关于咳嗽的文章可在以下网址找到：Grady, Denise (2008), “The Mysterious Cough, Caught on Film,” New York Times , October 27; http://www.nytimes.com/2008/10/28/science/28cough.html。她的文章所依据的《新英格兰医学杂志》文章是 Tang, Julian W., and Gary S. Settles (2008), “Coughing and Aerosols,” New England Journal of Medicine 359, 15。

schlieren photography: Grady’s article about the cough can be found at Grady, Denise (2008), “The Mysterious Cough, Caught on Film,” New York Times, October 27; http://www.nytimes.com/2008/10/28/science/28cough.html. The New England Journal of Medicine article on which her piece is based is Tang, Julian W., and Gary S. Settles (2008), “Coughing and Aerosols,” New England Journal of Medicine 359, 15.

这其实并没有告诉我们太多信息：不出所料，文章的刊登位置等外部因素也与文章是否上榜相关。出现在纸质报纸头版的文章比刊登在内页的文章分享量更高。位于《纽约时报》首页顶部的文章比需要点击多次才能找到的文章分享量更高。U2乐队主唱Bono或前参议员鲍勃·多尔撰写的文章比其他不太知名的作者的文章分享量更高。但这些关联既不令人惊讶，也没有什么实际意义。购买超级碗广告或聘请Bono确实有助于提高内容的浏览量和分享量。然而，大多数人既没有足够的资金，也没有足够的人脉关系来实现这些目标。因此，我们把重点放在了与分享相关的内容本身的因素上。

That doesn’t really tell us much: Not surprisingly, external factors like where an article was featured also correlated with whether an article made the list. Articles that appeared on the front page of the physical newspaper were shared more than those placed inside. Articles featured at the top of the Times home page were shared more than those buried several clicks into the website. Articles written by U2’s Bono or former senator Bob Dole were shared more often than articles written by less famous authors. But these relationships are neither that surprising nor that helpful. Buying a Super Bowl ad or hiring Bono will help increase the chance that content gets viewed and shared. Most people, however, don’t have the funding or personal connections to make those things happen. Instead, we focused on aspects of the content itself that were linked to sharing.

更多有用的文章：关于我们对《纽约时报》电子邮件发送量最高的列表的研究的完整描述以及我们的发现，可以在 Berger、Jonah 和 Katherine Milkman (2012) 的文章“是什么让在线内容病毒式传播”中找到，该文章发表于《市场营销研究杂志》第 49 卷第 2 期，第 192-205 页。

More useful articles: A full description of our research on The New York Times Most E-Mailed list, as well as our findings, can be found in Berger, Jonah, and Katherine Milkman (2012), “What Makes Online Content Viral,” Journal of Marketing Research 49, no. 2, 192–205.

敬畏是一种惊奇之感：关于敬畏的精彩概述文章，请参见 Keltner, D. 和 J. Haidt (2003)，“Approaching Awe, a Moral, Spiritual, and Aesthetic Emotion,” Cognition and Emotion , 17, 297–314。关于更新的实证研究，请参见 Shiota, MN, D. Keltner 和 A. Mossman (2007)，“The Nature of Awe: Elicitors, Appraisals, and Effects on Self-concept,” Cognition and Emotion 21, 944–63。

awe is the sense of wonder: For a great overview article on awe, see Keltner, D., and J. Haidt (2003), “Approaching Awe, a Moral, Spiritual, and Aesthetic Emotion,” Cognition and Emotion, 17, 297–314. For a more recent empirical treatment, see Shiota, M. N., D. Keltner, and A. Mossman (2007), “The Nature of Awe: Elicitors, Appraisals, and Effects on Self-concept,” Cognition and Emotion 21, 944–63.

“最美好的情感”：爱因斯坦的这句名言出自 Ulam, SM, Françoise Ulam 和 Jan Myielski (1976)，《数学家的冒险》（纽约：Charles Scribner's Sons 出版社），第 289 页。

“The most beautiful emotion”: The Einstein quote comes from Ulam, S. M., Françoise Ulam, and Jan Myielski (1976), Adventures of a Mathematician (New York: Charles Scribner’s Sons), 289.

令人惊叹的文章： Berger 和 Milkman，“是什么让网络内容病毒式传播”，192-205。

Awe-inspiring articles: Berger and Milkman, “What Makes Online Content Viral,” 192–205.

苏珊·博伊尔的首次亮相：苏珊·博伊尔的表演可以在http://jonahberger.com上找到。

Susan Boyle’s first appearance: Susan Boyle’s performance can be found at http://jonahberger.com.

有助于加深我们的社会联系：有关情感的社会分享如何加深社会联系的讨论，请参阅 Peters、Kim 和 Yoshihasa Kashima (2007)，“从社交谈话到社会行动：通过情感分享塑造社会三元组”，《人格与社会心理学杂志》 93，第 5 期，780-97 页。

helps deepen our social connection: For a discussion of how the social sharing of emotion deepens social bonds, see Peters, Kim, and Yoshihasa Kashima (2007), “From Social Talk to Social Action: Shaping the Social Triad with Emotion Sharing,” Journal of Personality and Social Psychology 93, no. 5, 780–97.

负面内容应该更容易传播：有关正面和负面口碑的讨论，请参阅 Godes, Dave, Yubo Chen, Sanjiv Das, Chrysanthos Dellarocas, Bruce Pfeiffer 等人 (2005)，“公司对社会互动的管理”，《营销快报》 16，第 3-4 期，415-28 页。

negative content should be more viral: For a discussion of positive and negative word of mouth, see Godes, Dave, Yubo Chen, Sanjiv Das, Chrysanthos Dellarocas, Bruce Pfeiffer, et al. (2005), “The Firm’s Management of Social Interactions,” Marketing Letters 16, nos. 3–4, 415–28.

心理学家杰米·彭尼贝克 (Jamie Pennebaker) 指出：关于语言学探究和词频统计的讨论，可参见：彭尼贝克、詹姆斯·W.、罗杰·J.·布斯和玛莎·E.·弗朗西斯 (2007)，“语言学探究和词频统计：LIWC2007”，访问日期：2011年10月14日； http://www.liwc.net/。关于 LIWC 如何被用于研究一系列心理过程的综述，请参见彭尼贝克、詹姆斯·W.、马蒂亚斯·R.·梅尔和凯蒂·尼德霍弗 (2003)，“自然语言使用的心理学方面：我们的语言，我们自己”，《心理学年鉴》54，547-77。

psychologist Jamie Pennebaker: A discussion of linguistic inquiry and word count can be found in: Pennebaker, James W., Roger J. Booth, and Martha E. Francis (2007), “Linguistic Inquiry and Word Count: LIWC2007,” accessed October 14, 2011; http://www.liwc.net/. For a review of how LIWC has been used to study a range of psychological processes, see Pennebaker, James W., Matthias R. Mehl, and Katie Niederhoffer (2003), “Psychological Aspects of Natural Language Use: Our Words, Our Selves,” Annual Review of Psychology 54, 547–77.

积极和消极的程度：一段文字中情感词汇的百分比越高，它表达的情感就越多。Pennebaker, JW, 和 ME Francis (1996), “披露中的认知、情感和语言过程”，认知与情感10, 601–26。

the amount of positivity and negativity: The greater the percentage of emotional words in a passage of text, the more emotion it tends to express. Pennebaker, J. W., and M. E. Francis (1996), “Cognitive, Emotional, and Language Processes in Disclosure,” Cognition and Emotion 10, 601–26.

新来者爱上纽约市： Berger 和 Milkman，“是什么让在线内容病毒式传播”，192-205。

newcomers falling in love with New York City: Berger and Milkman, “What Makes Online Content Viral,” 192–205.

引起愤怒或焦虑的文章：同上。

Articles that evoked anger or anxiety: Ibid.

生理唤醒：心理学领域的大量研究探讨了所谓的情感二维理论（效价和唤醒度）。相关讨论参见 Barrett、Lisa Feldman 和 James A. Russell (1999)，“当前情感的结构：争议与新兴共识”，《心理科学前沿》 8，第 1 期，10-14 页；Christie、IC 和 BH Friedman (2004)，“离散情绪的自主神经特异性和维度”情感空间：多元方法”，《国际心理生理学杂志》 51，143-53；以及 Schlosberg，H.（1954），“情绪的三个维度”，《心理学评论》 61，第 2 期，81-88。

physiological arousal: A great deal of research in psychology has examined the so-called two-dimensional theory of affect (valence and arousal). For discussions, see Barrett, Lisa Feldman, and James A. Russell (1999), “The Structure of Current Affect: Controversies and Emerging Consensus,” Current Directions in Psychological Science 8, no. 1, 10–14; Christie, I. C., and B. H. Friedman (2004), “Autonomic Specificity of Discrete Emotion and Dimensions of Affective Space: A Multivariate Approach,” International Journal of Psychophysiology 51, 143–53; and Schlosberg, H. (1954), “Three Dimensions of Emotion,” Psychological Review 61, no. 2, 81–88.

这就是唤醒：有关唤醒的神经生物学的讨论，请参阅 Heilman, KM (1997)，“情绪体验的神经生物学”，《神经精神病学杂志》 9，439-48。

This is arousal: For a discussion of the neurobiology of arousal, see Heilman, K. M. (1997), “The Neurobiology of Emotional Experience,” Journal of Neuropsychiatry 9, 439–48.

分享有趣的内容：唤醒促进社会传播的结果可以在 Berger, Jonah (2011) 的文章“Arousal Increases Social Transmission of Information,” Psychological Science 22, no. 7, 891–93 中找到。

funny content is shared: The result that arousal boosts social transmission can be found in Berger, Jonah (2011), “Arousal Increases Social Transmission of Information,” Psychological Science 22, no. 7, 891–93.

在前往演出途中：戴夫·卡罗尔 (Dave Carroll) 与美联航的奇遇记详见他的著作：《卡罗尔，戴夫 (2012)，美联航弄坏了吉他：社交媒体时代一个人的力量》（加州卡尔斯巴德：海伊出版社）。如需收听歌曲，请访问http://jonahberger.com。

While traveling to a gig: A summary of Dave Carroll’s odyssey with United Airlines can be found in his book: Carroll, Dave (2012), United Breaks Guitars: The Power of One Voice in the Age of Social Media (Carlsbad, CA: Hay House). To hear the actual song, go to http://jonahberger.com.

这段视频讲述了一个萌芽的爱情故事：您可以在http://jonahberger.com观看“巴黎之恋”的片段。“巴黎之恋”背后的故事源于2012年6月20日对安东尼·卡法罗的采访。

The clip tells a budding love story: A clip of “Parisian Love” can be viewed at http://jonahberger.com. The story behind “Parisian Love” came from an interview with Anthony Cafaro on June 20, 2012.

“最好的结果不会出现在搜索引擎中”：这句话出自 Teressa Iezzi (2010)，“认识 Google 五人组”， http://creativity-online.com/news/the-google-creative-lab/146084。

“The best results don’t show up in a search engine”: The quote came from Iezzi, Teressa (2010), “Meet the Google Five,” http://creativity-online.com/news/the-google-creative-lab/146084.

只需增加更多刺激： Berger 和 Milkman，“是什么让网络内容病毒式传播”，192-205。

Simply adding more arousal: Berger and Milkman, “What Makes Online Content Viral,” 192–205.

肥胖会降低预期寿命：有关肥胖的统计数据来自 Whitlock、Gary、Sarah Lewington、Paul Sherliker 和 Richard Peto (2009)，“体重指数与死亡率”，《柳叶刀》 374，第 9684 期，114 页。

obesity reduces life expectancy: The statistic about obesity came from Whitlock, Gary, Sarah Lewington, Paul Sherliker, and Richard Peto (2009), “Body-mass Index and Mortality,” The Lancet 374, no. 9684, 114.

厌恶是一种高度激起的情绪：有关厌恶如何影响社会传播的讨论，请参阅 Heath、Chip、Chris Bell 和 Emily Sternberg (2001)，“模因中的情绪选择：都市传说的案例”，《人格与社会心理学杂志》 81，第 6 期，1028-41 页。

disgust is a highly arousing emotion: For a discussion of how disgust affects social transmission, see Heath, Chip, Chris Bell, and Emily Sternberg (2001), “Emotional Selection in Memes: The Case of Urban Legends,” Journal of Personality and Social Psychology 81, no. 6, 1028–41.

这种做法可以加强母子之间的联系：要了解更多关于背巾育儿和依恋的信息，请访问www.attachmentparenting.org。

the practice strengthens the maternal bond: To learn more about baby-wearing and attachment, see www.attachmentparenting.org.

该公司制作了一则以疼痛为中心的广告：要观看 Motrin 广告的片段，请访问http://jonahberger.com。

the company created an ad centered on the aches: To see a clip of the Motrin ad, see http://jonahberger.com.

营销惨败： Learmonth, Michael (2008)，“Twitter 批评者如何搞垮 Motrin Mom Campaign：博客作者在周末引发轩然大波，迫使强生公司撤回广告并道歉”， AdAge.com，11 月 17 日，检索自http://adage.com/article/digital/twittering-critics-brought-motrin-mom-campaign/132622。

the marketing debacle: Learmonth, Michael (2008), “How Twittering Critics Brought Down Motrin Mom Campaign: Bloggers Ignite Brush Fire over Weekend, Forcing J&J to Pull Ads, Issue Apology,” AdAge.com, November 17, retrieved from http://adage.com/article/digital/twittering-critics-brought-motrin-mom-campaign/132622.

4.公众

4. Public

肯·西格尔是史蒂夫·乔布斯的得力助手：以上内容摘自我于 2012 年 5 月 15 日对肯·西格尔的采访。有关肯在苹果公司工作的更多信息，请参阅西格尔 (2012) 的《疯狂的简单：驱动苹果成功的执念》（纽约：Portfolio/Penguin）。

Ken Segall was Steve Jobs’s right hand man: All taken from my interview with Ken Segall on May, 15, 2012. For more information on Ken’s work with Apple, see Segall (2012), Insanely Simple: The Obsession That Drives Apple’s Success (New York: Portfolio/Penguin).

如果很多人在那里吃饭：有关经济学家对此问题的看法，请参阅 Becker, Gary S. (1991)，“关于餐馆定价和其他社会影响价格的例子”，《政治经济学杂志》 99，第 3 期，1109-16 页。

If lots of people are eating there: For an economist’s take on this issue, see Becker, Gary S. (1991), “A Note on Restaurant Pricing and Other Examples of Social Influence on Price,” Journal of Political Economy 99, no. 3, 1109–16.

选择其他食客偏爱的菜肴：关于主菜选择中社会影响的证据，请参见 Cai, Hongbi, Yuyu Chen 和 Hanming Fang (2009)，“观察学习：来自随机自然实地实验的证据”，《美国经济评论》99，第 3 期，864–82 页。关于酒店毛巾使用中从众行为的研究，请参见 Goldstein, Noah J., Robert B. Cialdini 和 Vladas Griskevicius (2008)，“视野开阔的房间：利用社会规范激励酒店环境保护”，《消费者研究杂志》 35，472–82 页。类似的方法也被用于引导人们减少家庭能源消耗。

pick entrées preferred by other diners: For evidence of social influence in entrée choice, see Cai, Hongbi, Yuyu Chen, and Hanming Fang (2009), “Observational Learning: Evidence from a Randomized Natural Field Experiment,” American Economic Review 99, no. 3, 864–82. For research on conformity in hotel towel use, see Goldstein, Noah J., Robert B. Cialdini, and Vladas Griskevicius (2008), “A Room with a Viewpoint: Using Social Norms to Motivate Environmental Conservation in Hotels,” Journal of Consumer Research 35, 472–82. Similar approaches have also been applied to get people to reduce home energy consumption.

人们更有可能投票：有关社会影响对投票率的影响的证据，请参见 Nickerson, David W. (2008)，“投票会传染吗？来自两项实地实验的证据”，《美国政治科学评论》 102，49-57。有关社会影响如何影响肥胖和戒烟的讨论，请参见 Christakis, Nicholas A. 和 James Fowler (2009)，《互联：我们社交网络的惊人力量及其如何塑造我们的生活》（纽约：Little, Brown, and Company）。

People are more likely to vote: For evidence of social influence in voter turnout, see Nickerson, David W. (2008), “Is Voting Contagious? Evidence from Two Field Experiments,” American Political Science Review 102, 49–57. For a discussion of how social influence may affect obesity and smoking cessation, see Christakis, Nicholas A., and James Fowler (2009), Connected: The Surprising Power of Our Social Networks and How They Shape Our Lives (New York: Little, Brown, and Company).

购买哪种品牌的咖啡：关于社会影响在咖啡选择中的作用，参见 Burnkrant, Robert E. 和 Alain Cousineau (1975)，“消费者行为中的信息性和规范性社会影响”，《消费者研究杂志》 2，206–15。关于社会影响在纳税中的作用，参见 Thaler, Richard (2012)，“在制定规则之前观察行为”，《纽约时报》 ，7 月 12 日，检索自http://www.nytimes.com/2012/07/08/business/behavioral-science-can-help-guide-policy-economic-view.html。

what brand of coffee to buy: For evidence of social influence in coffee choice, see Burnkrant, Robert E., and Alain Cousineau (1975), “Informational and Normative Social Influence in Buyer Behavior,” Journal of Consumer Research 2, 206–15. For evidence of social influence in paying taxes, see Thaler, Richard (2012), “Watching Behavior Before Writing the Rules,” New York Times, July 12, retrieved from http://www.nytimes.com/2012/07/08/business/behavioral-science-can-help-guide-policy-economic-view.html.

人们更容易发笑：关于笑声的社会影响的证据，请参见 Provine, RR (1992)，“传染性笑声：笑声“笑和微笑的充分刺激”，心理学学会公报30，1-4。

people are more likely to laugh: For evidence about social influence in laughter, see Provine, R. R. (1992), “Contagious Laughter: Laughter Is a Sufficient Stimulus for Laughs and Smiles,” Bulletin of the Psychonomic Society 30, 1–4.

“社会认同”：西奥迪尼，罗伯特·B.（2001），《影响力：科学与实践》（马萨诸塞州尼德姆高地：Allyn & Bacon）。

“social proof”: Cialdini, Robert B. (2001), Influence: Science and Practice (Needham Heights, Mass.: Allyn & Bacon).

当她查看数百例肾脏捐赠案例时： Juanjuan 的精彩论文中的研究结果，以及有关肾衰竭和捐赠的各种统计数据，可以在 Zhang, Juanjuan (2010) 的文章“The Sound of Silence: Observational Learning in the US Kidney Market,” Marketing Science 29, no. 2, 315–35 中找到。

when she looked at hundreds of kidney donations: The findings from Juanjuan’s clever paper, as well as assorted statistics about kidney failure and donation, can be found at Zhang, Juanjuan (2010), “The Sound of Silence: Observational Learning in the U.S. Kidney Market,” Marketing Science 29, no. 2, 315–35.

Koreen Johannessen 开始： 2012 年 6 月 21 日对 Koreen Johannessen 的采访。

Koreen Johannessen started: Interview with Koreen Johannessen on June 21, 2012.

大学生……报告饮酒：有关大学生酗酒的一些统计数据，请参见 Weschler, Henry 和 Toben F. Nelson (2008)，“我们从哈佛大学公共卫生学院酒精研究中学到了什么：关注大学生饮酒及其环境因素”，《酒精与药物研究杂志》 69，481–90。另请参见 Hingson, Ralph、Timothy Heeren、Michael Winter 和 Henry Wechsler (2005)，“美国 18–24 岁大学生酒精相关死亡率和发病率的程度：1998 年至 2001 年的变化”，《公共卫生年度评论》26，259–79，以及http://www.alcohol101plus.org/downloads/collegestudents.pdf。

college students . . . report drinking alcohol: For some statistics about college students’ binge drinking, see Weschler, Henry, and Toben F. Nelson (2008), “What We Have Learned from the Harvard School of Public Health College Alcohol Study: Focusing Attention on College Student Alcohol Consumption and the Environmental Conditions That Promote It,” Journal of Studies on Alcohol and Drugs 69, 481–90. Also see Hingson, Ralph, Timothy Heeren, Michael Winter, and Henry Wechsler (2005), “Magnitude of Alcohol-Related Mortality and Morbidity Among U.S. College Students Ages 18–24: Changes from 1998 to 2001,” Annual Review of Public Health, 26, 259–79, and http://www.alcohol101plus.org/downloads/collegestudents.pdf.

他们对饮酒的看法：心理学家用“多元无知”一词来讨论这个问题。多元无知指的是这样一种情况：群体中的大多数人私下里不接受某种规范（例如大量饮酒），但却错误地认为其他人接受这种规范，部分原因是他们能看到其他人的行为，却看不到他们的想法。更深入的讨论，请参见 Deborah A. Prentice 和 Dale T. Miller (1993) 的文章“多元无知与校园饮酒：误解社会规范的一些后果”，发表于《人格与社会心理学杂志》第 64 卷第 2 期，第 243-256 页。

how they felt about drinking: Psychologists use the term “pluralistic ignorance” to talk about this issue. Pluralistic ignorance refers to a case where most people in a group privately reject a norm (such as drinking a lot) but incorrectly assume that others accept it, in part because they can see others’ behavior but not their thoughts. For a broader discussion, see Prentice, Deborah A., and Dale T. Miller (1993), “Pluralistic Ignorance and Alcohol Use on Campus: Some Consequences of Misperceiving the Social Norm,” Journal of Personality and Social Psychology 64, no. 2, 243–56.

一家餐厅可能非常受欢迎：这就是为什么餐厅领班通常会安排最先到的几位客人坐在餐厅前窗附近。说起来挺有意思的，纽约有一家餐厅，我一直以为它非常火爆，因为它外面的长椅总是坐满了人。我以为坐在长椅上的人都是在等位吃饭。后来我才意识到，他们可能只是因为那里是个方便的休息场所。

A restaurant might be extremely popular: This is why the maître d’ will often seat the first few arrivals near the window at the front of the restaurant. As a funny side note, there is a place in New York City that I always assumed was extremely popular because it has benches outside that were always full. I assumed that the people sitting on them were waiting to eat. Only later did I realize that they may have been sitting there because it was a convenient place to rest for a few minutes.

150万辆汽车销量：欲了解我们汽车研究的完整报道，参见 McShane、Blakely、Eric T. Bradlow 和 Jonah Berger (2012)，“视觉影响与社会群体”，《市场营销研究杂志》（即将出版）。另见 Grinblatt、M.、M. Keloharrju 和 S. Ikaheimo (2008)，“社会影响与消费：来自邻居汽车购买的证据”，《经济与统计评论》 90，第 4 期，735–53 页。

1.5 million car sales: For the full story on our automobile research, see McShane, Blakely, Eric T. Bradlow, and Jonah Berger (2012), “Visual Influence and Social Groups,” Journal of Marketing Research, (forthcoming). Also see Grinblatt, M., M. Keloharrju, and S. Ikaheimo (2008), “Social Influence and Consumption: Evidence from the Automobile Purchases of Neighbors,” The Review of Economics and Statistics 90, no. 4, 735–53.

越容易看到的东西：有关公众可见性如何影响口碑的证据，请参阅 Berger、Jonah 和 Eric Sc​​hwartz (2011)，“是什么驱动了即时和持续的口碑？”市场营销研究杂志48，第 5 期，869-80 页。

The easier something is to see: For evidence about how public visibility affects word of mouth, see Berger, Jonah, and Eric Schwartz (2011), “What Drives Immediate and Ongoing Word of Mouth?” Journal of Marketing Research 48, no. 5, 869–80.

癌症夺走生命：有关癌症如何影响男性的统计数据，请参阅http://www.cdc.gov/features/cancerandmen/和http://www.wcrf.org/cancer_statistics/world_cancer_statistics.php。

cancer claims the lives: For statistics about how cancer affects men, see http://www.cdc.gov/features/cancerandmen/ and http://www.wcrf.org/cancer_statistics/world_cancer_statistics.php.

一切都始于一个星期天的下午：有关 Movember 创立的背景故事，以及其增长和发展的统计数据，请访问ca.movember.com和http://billabout.com/get-your-mo-on%E2%80%A8interview-adam-garone-movember-founder/。

It all started one Sunday afternoon: For the backstory on the founding of Movember, as well as statistics on its growth and development, see ca.movember.com and http://billabout.com/get-your-mo-on%E2%80%A8interview-adam-garone-movember-founder/.

Johannessen 能够减少酗酒：有关相关讨论，请参阅 Schroeder, Christine M. 和 Deborah A. Prentice (1998)，“揭露多元无知以减少大学生的饮酒行为”，《应用社会心理学杂志》 28，2150–80。

Johannessen was able to decrease heavy drinking: For a related discussion, see Schroeder, Christine M., and Deborah A. Prentice (1998), “Exposing Pluralistic Ignorance to Reduce Alcohol Use Among College Students,” Journal of Applied Social Psychology 28, 2150–80.

3.5亿用户：有关Hotmail的基本详情和统计数据，请参阅http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hotmail。

350 million users: For basic details and statistics about Hotmail, see http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hotmail.

苹果的白色耳机线格外引人注目：这种可见的信号在存在网络效应的领域尤为重要，或者说，产品的价值取决于使用它的人数。

Apple’s white headphone cords stood out: Such visible signals are particularly important in domains where there are network effects, or where the value of a product depends on the number of others who are using it.

它被称为行为残留： “行为残留”一词源于心理学家萨姆·戈斯林。有关他在该领域的研究讨论，请参阅戈斯林，萨姆（2008），《窥探：你的物品揭示了你的本质》（纽约：基础书籍）。

it’s called behavioral residue: The term “behavioral residue” comes from psychologist Sam Gosling. For a discussion of his research in the area, see Gosling, Sam (2008), Snoop: What Your Stuff Says About You (New York: Basic Books).

“一个愚蠢的想法”： Mickle, Tripp (2009)，“五年辉煌”，《体育商业日报》 ，9 月 14 日，检索自http://www.sportsbusinessdaily.com/Journal/Issues/2009/09/20090914/This-Weeks-News/Five-Strong-Years.aspx。

“a stupid idea”: Mickle, Tripp (2009), “Five Strong Years,” Sports Business Daily, September 14, retrieved from http://www.sportsbusinessdaily.com/Journal/Issues/2009/09/20090914/This-Weeks-News/Five-Strong-Years.aspx.

就连阿姆斯特朗也难以置信： Carr, Austin (2011)，“兰斯·阿姆斯特朗和道格·乌尔曼认为 Livestrong 腕带会失败”，《快公司》，11 月 11 日，检索自http://www.fastcompany.com/article/doug-ulman-didnt-think-the-livestrong-bracelets-would-sell。

Even Armstrong was incredulous: Carr, Austin (2011), “Lance Armstrong, Doug Ulman Thought the Livestrong Wristband Would Fail,” Fast Company, November 11, retrieved from http://www.fastcompany.com/article/doug-ulman-didnt-think-the-livestrong-bracelets-would-sell.

公众的关注：许多因素促成了 Livestrong 的成功。腕带取得了成功。它们只需一美元，让人们可以轻松尝试参与到这项运动中来，即使他们并不确定自己是否想要全身心投入。腕带佩戴起来也非常方便。与需要别在不同衣物上的乳腺癌丝带不同，Livestrong 腕带可以一直佩戴。你可以整天佩戴，睡觉时也戴着，甚至洗澡时也戴着。你永远不必摘下它，也不用担心把它放在哪里。但正如前文所述，颜色也发挥了重要作用。

This public visibility: Many things contributed to making Livestrong bands a success. They cost only a dollar, making it easy for people to try out being part of the movement, even if they weren’t sure they wanted to commit themselves. The wristbands were also really easy to wear. Unlike breast cancer ribbons, which you have to pin on different pieces of clothing, Livestrong bands could be worn all the time. You could wear one all day, keep it on while sleeping, even wear it in the shower. You never had to take it off or remember where you left it. But color also played an important role, as discussed.

“腕带的好处”： 2006 年对 Scott MacEachern 的采访。

“The nice thing about a wristband”: Interview with Scott MacEachern, 2006.

安装这些按钮： Gelles, David (2010)，“电子商务迅速点赞 Facebook 按钮”，《金融时报》，9 月 21 日，检索自http://www.ft.com/cms/s/2/1599be2e-c5a9-11df-ab48-00144feab49a.html。

installing these buttons: Gelles, David (2010), “E-commerce Takes an Instant Liking to Facebook Button,” Financial Times, September 21, retrieved from http://www.ft.com/cms/s/2/1599be2e-c5a9-11df-ab48-00144feab49a.html.

反毒品广告是否真的有效： Hornik, Robert, Lela Jacobsohn, Robert Orwin, Andrea Piesse 和 Graham Kalton (2008)，“全国青年反毒品媒体运动对青年的影响”，《美国公共卫生杂志》 98，第 12 期，2229–36。

whether anti-drug ads were actually effective: Hornik, Robert, Lela Jacobsohn, Robert Orwin, Andrea Piesse, and Graham Kalton (2008), “Effects of the National Youth Anti-Drug Media Campaign on Youths,” American Journal of Public Health 98, no. 12, 2229–36.

“300亿首歌曲被非法下载”：美国唱片工业协会网站， http://www.riaa.com/faq.php，2012年6月1日检索。

“30 billion songs were illegally downloaded”: Recording Industry Association of America website, http://www.riaa.com/faq.php, retrieved June 1, 2012.

偷窃石化木的人： Cialdini, Robert B., Linda J. Demaine, Brad J. Sagarin, Daniel W. Barrett, Kelton Rhoads 和 Patricia L. Winter (2006)，“管理社会规范以产生说服力”，《社会影响》 1，第 1 期，3-15 页。

people who stole petrified wood: Cialdini, Robert B., Linda J. Demaine, Brad J. Sagarin, Daniel W. Barrett, Kelton Rhoads, and Patricia L. Winter (2006), “Managing Social Norms for Persuasive Impact,” Social Influence 1, no. 1, 3–15.

5.实用价值

5. Practical Value

如果非要选一个人：肯·克雷格的采访，2012 年 2 月 20 日。肯的玉米戏法片段可以在http://jonahberger.com上看到。

If you had to pick someone: Interview with Ken Craig, February 20, 2012. A clip of Ken’s corn trick can be seen at http://jonahberger.com.

卡尼曼荣获诺贝尔奖：关于前景理论的通俗解读，请参阅卡尼曼的著作《思考，快与慢》（2011），由Farrar, Straus and Giroux出版社出版。关于更学术化的解读，请参阅卡尼曼、丹尼尔和阿莫斯·特沃斯基（1979）合著的《前景理论：风险决策分析》，载于《计量经济学》 47（1979），第263-291页。本章讨论的许多情景都改编自理查德·塞勒关于心理账户的研究。参见塞勒（1980）的《迈向消费者选择的实证理论》，载于《经济行为与组织杂志》 1，第39-60页。以及 Thaler, Richard (1985)，“心理账户与消费者选择”，《营销科学》 4，199-214。

Kahneman received the Nobel: For a popular treatment of prospect theory, see Kahneman’s book Thinking, Fast and Slow (2011), from Farrar, Straus and Giroux. For a more academic treatment, see Kahneman, Daniel, and Amos Tversky (1979), “Prospect Theory: An Analysis of Decision Under Risk,” Econometrica 47 (1979), 263–91. Many of the scenarios discussed in this chapter are adapted from Richard Thaler’s work on mental accounting. See Thaler, Richard (1980), “Toward a Positive Theory of Consumer Choice,” Journal of Economic Behavior and Organization 1, 39–60; and Thaler, Richard (1985), “Mental Accounting and Consumer Choice,” Marketing Science 4, 199–214.

为了检验这种可能性： Anderson 和 Simester 的研究可以在 Anderson, Eric T., 和 Duncan I. Simester (2001) 的文章“当更多产品有销售标志时，销售标志的效果会降低吗？” Marketing Science 20, no. 2, 121–42 中找到。

To test this possibility: Anderson and Simester’s research can be found at Anderson, Eric T., and Duncan I. Simester (2001), “Are Sale Signs Less Effective When More Products Have Them?” Marketing Science 20, no. 2, 121–42.

购买一台新的收音机闹钟：改编自 Thaler，“走向消费者选择的积极理论”，第 39-60 页。

buy a new clock radio: Adapted from Thaler, “Toward a Positive Theory of Consumer Choice,” 39–60.

在宣传商品促销时：大量研究探讨了宣传商品促销如何影响消费者对商品价值的感知。例如，参见Blattberg, Robert, Richard A. Briesch, and Edward J. Fox (1995), “How Promotions Work,” Marketing Science 14, no. 3, 122–32；Lattin, James M., and Randolph E. Bucklin (1989), “Reference Effects of Price and Promotion on Brand Choice Behavior,” Journal of Marketing Research 26, no. 3, 299–310；以及Raju, Jagmohan S. (1992), “The Effect of Price Promotions on Variability in Product Category Sales,” Marketing Science 11, no. 3, 207–20。关于促销标志如何影响购买行为的实证研究，参见Anderson和Simester的“Are Sale Signs Less Effective,” 121–42。

While noting something is on sale: A good deal of research has examined how saying something is on sale affects perceived value. For examples, see Blattberg, Robert, Richard A. Briesch, and Edward J. Fox (1995), “How Promotions Work,” Marketing Science 14, no. 3, 122–32; Lattin, James M., and Randolph E. Bucklin (1989), “Reference Effects of Price and Promotion on Brand Choice Behavior,” Journal of Marketing Research 26, no. 3, 299–310; and Raju, Jagmohan S. (1992), “The Effect of Price Promotions on Variability in Product Category Sales,” Marketing Science 11, no. 3, 207–20. For an empirical investigation of how sale signs affect purchase, see Anderson and Simester, “Are Sale Signs Less Effective,” 121–42.

购买数量限制会增加销售额： Inman, Jeffrey J.、Anil C. Peter 和 Priya Raghubir (1997)，“交易框架：限制在突出交易价值中的作用”，《消费者研究杂志》 24（6 月），68-79。

quantity purchase limits increase sales: Inman, Jeffrey J., Anil C. Peter, and Priya Raghubir (1997), “Framing the Deal: The Role of Restrictions in Accentuating the Deal Value,” Journal of Consumer Research 24 (June), 68–79.

这增加了实用价值：有关限制谁可以获得优惠如何影响感知价值的证据，请参阅 Schindler, Robert M. (1998)，“感知自己对获得折扣负责的后果：精明购物者感受的证据”，《消费者心理学杂志》 7，第 4 期，371-92 页。

This increases Practical Value: For evidence on how restrictions on who can get access to a deal affect perceived value, see Schindler, Robert M. (1998), “Consequences of Perceiving Oneself as Responsible for Obtaining a Discount: Evidence for Smart-Shopper Feelings,” Journal of Consumer Psychology 7, no. 4, 371–92.

折扣是否看起来更大：有关感知价值受绝对折扣和相对折扣影响的证据，请参阅 Chen, S.-FS, KB Monroe 和 Yung-Chein Lou (1998)，“价格促销信息框架对消费者感知和购买意愿的影响”，《零售杂志》 74，第 3 期，353-72 页。

whether a discount seems larger: For evidence that perceived value is affected by absolute and relative discounts, see Chen, S.-F. S., K.B. Monroe, and Yung-Chein Lou (1998), “The Effects of Framing Price Promotion Messages on Consumers’ Perceptions and Purchase Intentions,” Journal of Retailing 74, no. 3, 353–72.

您可能听说过：有关疫苗与自闭症之间的联系以及错误信息后果的讨论，请参阅以下内容：McIntyre, Peter 和 Julie Leask (2008)，“提高麻疹、腮腺炎、风疹疫苗的接种率”，《英国医学杂志》 336，第 7647 期，729–30；Pepys, Mark B. (2007)，“科学与意外发现”，《临床医学》 7，第 6 期，562–78；以及 Mnookin, Seth (2011)，《恐慌病毒》（纽约：西蒙与舒斯特出版社）。

You may have heard: See the following for a discussion of the link between vaccines and autism and the consequences of the false information: McIntyre, Peter, and Julie Leask (2008), “Improving Uptake of MMR Vaccine,” British Medical Journal 336, no. 7647, 729–30; Pepys, Mark B. (2007), “Science and Serendipity,” Clinical Medicine 7, no. 6, 562–78; and Mnookin, Seth (2011), The Panic Virus (New York: Simon and Schuster).

6.故事

6. Stories

这场战斗发生在公元前 1170 年左右：关于特洛伊木马出现时间的估计来自这篇论文：Baikouzis, Constantino, and Marcelo O. Magnasco (2008), “Is an Eclipse Described in The Odyssey ?” Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences 105, no. 26, 8823–28。

battle took place around 1170 BC: Estimates of the timing of the Trojan Horse come from this paper: Baikouzis, Constantino, and Marcelo O. Magnasco (2008), “Is an Eclipse Described in The Odyssey?” Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences 105, no. 26, 8823–28.

故事……帮助我们理解世界： Baumeister, Roy F.、Liquing Zhang 和 Kathleen D. Vohs (2004)，“八卦作为文化学习”，《普通心理学评论》 8，111-21。

Stories . . . help us make sense of the world: Baumeister, Roy F., Liquing Zhang, and Kathleen D. Vohs (2004), “Gossip as Cultural Learning,” Review of General Psychology 8, 111–21.

我们更容易被说服：有关故事如何使反驳更难的研究，请参阅 Kardes, Frank R. (1993)，“消费者推断：决定因素、后果和对广告的影响”，载于Andrew A. Mitchell 编辑的《广告曝光、记忆和选择》（新泽西州希尔斯代尔：Erlbaum 出版社），第 163-191 页。

we’re much more likely to be persuaded: For research related to how stories can make it harder to counterargue, see Kardes, Frank R. (1993), “Consumer Inference: Determinants, Consequences, and Implications for Advertising,” in Advertising Exposure, Memory and Choice, ed. Andrew A. Mitchell (Hillsdale, N.J.: Erlbaum), 163–91.

他减掉了那么多体重：有关 Jared 的故事概述，请参阅http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jared_Fogle 。

He lost all that weight: See http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jared_Fogle for an overview of the Jared story.

于是他创作了一部短片：背景故事来自 2012 年 6 月 18 日对 Tim Piper 的采访。“进化”视频可在http://jonahberger.com观看。

So he created a short film: The backstory came from an interview with Tim Piper on June 18, 2012. The “Evolution” video can be seen at http://jonahberger.com.

2% 的女性认为自己很漂亮：这一事实来自 Etcoff, Nancy, Susie Orbach, Jennifer Scott, 和 Heidi D'Agostino (2004) 的《关于美的真相：全球报告》； 2012 年 6 月 1 日检索自http://www.scribd.com/doc/16653666/1/%E2%80%9CTHE-REAL-TRUTH-ABOUT-BEAUTY-A-GLOBAL-REPORT%E2%80%9D。

2 percent of women describe themselves as beautiful: This fact comes from Etcoff, Nancy, Susie Orbach, Jennifer Scott, and Heidi D’Agostino (2004), The Real Truth About Beauty: A Global Report; retrieved on June 1, 2012, from http://www.scribd.com/doc/16653666/1/%E2%80%9CTHE-REAL-TRUTH-ABOUT-BEAUTY-A-GLOBAL-REPORT%E2%80%9D.

两位数的销售增长：参见http://www.marketingvox.com/dove_evolution_goes_viral_with_triple_the_traffic_of_super_bowl_spot-022944/，该文章于 2012 年 5 月 15 日检索。另见http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Evolution_%28advertisement%29。

double-digit sales growth: See http://www.marketingvox.com/dove_evolution_goes_viral_with_triple_the_traffic_of_super_bowl_spot-022944/ retrieved on May 15, 2012. Also see http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Evolution_%28advertisement%29.

加拿大人 Ron Bensimhon： http://news.bbc.co.uk/2/hi/europe/3579148.stm。

Canadian Ron Bensimhon: http://news.bbc.co.uk/2/hi/europe/3579148.stm.

这是宣传噱头的一部分：有关事件的简要讨论，请参阅 BBC 新闻（2004 年 8 月 19 日）“图图恶作剧者被判入狱”。

part of a publicity stunt: For a brief discussion of the events, see BBC News (2004), “Jail Sentence for Tutu Prankster,” August 19.

历史上观看次数最多的在线广告：世界纪录学院（2011 年），“观看次数最多的在线广告：‘依云滚轴宝贝’创下世界纪录”，2012 年 5 月检索自http://www.worldrecordsacademy.org。

most viewed online advertisement in history: World Records Academy (2011), “Most Viewed Online Ad: ‘Evian Roller Babies’ Sets World Record,” retrieved May 2012 from http://www.worldrecordsacademy.org.

销售额下降了近 25%： O'Leary, Noreen (2010)，“病毒式营销真的有效吗？” 2011 年 5 月 21 日检索自http://www.adweek.com。

sales dropped almost 25 percent: O’Leary, Noreen (2010), “Does Viral Pay?” retrieved May 21, 2011, from http://www.adweek.com.

在一个场景中，一位父亲正在超市购物：要观看熊猫片段，请访问http://jonahberger.com。

In one spot a father is grocery shopping: To watch the Panda clip, go to http://jonahberger.com.

不谈搅拌机：有关有价值的病毒式传播的进一步讨论，请参阅 Akpinar、Ezgi 和 Jonah Berger (2012)，“有价值的病毒式传播”，沃顿工作论文。

without talking about a blender: For further discussion of valuable virality, see Akpinar, Ezgi, and Jonah Berger (2012), “Valuable Virality,” Wharton working paper.

心理学家戈登·奥尔波特和约瑟夫·波兹曼：奥尔波特，戈登和约瑟夫·波兹曼（1947 年），谣言心理学（纽约：H. Holt and Company）。

Psychologists Gordon Allport and Joseph Postman: Allport, Gordon, and Joseph Postman (1947), Psychology of Rumor (New York: H. Holt and Company).

结语

Epilogue

Thuan Le 到达越南时：关于 Thuan Le 和越南美甲沙龙的故事，请参阅 Tran, My-Thuan (2008)，“运气与波兰的混合”，《洛杉矶时报》，5 月 5 日。另请参阅http://www.cnn.com/video/?/video/us/2011/07/05/pkg.wynter.vietnamese.nail.salon.cnn。

when Thuan Le arrived: For the story of Thuan Le and the Vietnamese nail salons, see Tran, My-Thuan (2008), “A Mix of Luck, Polish,” Los Angeles Times, May 5. Also see http://www.cnn.com/video/?/video/us/2011/07/05/pkg.wynter.vietnamese.nail.salon.cnn.

柬埔寨裔美国人拥有： Ardey, Julie (2008)，“柬埔寨定居者打造甜甜圈之路”，《每日邮报》，2月18日；检索自http://www.dailyyonder.com/cambodian-settlers-glaze-donut-trail/2008/02/18/1062。

Cambodian Americans own: Ardey, Julie (2008), “Cambodian Settlers Glaze a Donut Trail,” Daily Yonder, February 18; retrieved from http://www.dailyyonder.com/cambodian-settlers-glaze-donut-trail/2008/02/18/1062.

韩国人拥有： Bleyer, Jennifer (2008)，“干洗店感受到来自中国的寒风”，《纽约时报》，4月27日。

Koreans own: Bleyer, Jennifer (2008), “Dry Cleaners Feel an Ill Wind from China,” New York Times, April 27.

波士顿 60% 的酒类商店： 2012 年 3 月 10 日检索自http://www.pbs.org/wgbh/amex/murder/peopleevents/p_immigrants.html。

60 percent of the liquor stores in Boston: Retrieved on March 10, 2012, from http://www.pbs.org/wgbh/amex/murder/peopleevents/p_immigrants.html.

犹太人制作： Klinger, Jerry，“俄国人来了，俄国人来了”，《美国犹太历史 1880–1924》，2012 年 3 月 15 日检索自http://www.jewishmag.com/85mag/usa8/usa8.htm。

Jews produced: Klinger, Jerry, “The Russians Are Coming, The Russians Are Coming,” America Jewish History 1880–1924, retrieved on March 15, 2012, from http://www.jewishmag.com/85mag/usa8/usa8.htm.

Duncan Watts 做了一个很好的比较： Watts, Duncan J. (2007)，“挑战有影响力的人假设”， WOMMA 口碑测量3, 207。

Duncan Watts makes a nice comparison: Watts, Duncan J. (2007), “Challenging the Influentials Hypothesis,” WOMMA Measuring Word of Mouth 3, 207.
